description: Perform a forensic Benford's Law analysis on the municipal vendor payments dataset in /home/ga/Documents/vendor_payments_FY23.xlsx to detect potential fraud anomalies. On a new sheet named 'Benford_Analysis', create a table with headers: Digit, Count, Actual_Freq, Expected_Freq, Variance, and Flag. Analyze the leading digits (1-9) of the payment amounts from the 'Payments' sheet to determine their actual frequency compared to the expected Benford's Law frequency. Flag any digit with a variance greater than 2% as 'Investigate', otherwise 'OK'. Include a chart on the 'Benford_Analysis' sheet comparing the actual and expected frequencies for each digit. Save the updated workbook.
